rationale: Section 48.201 governs permissible uses of tier two FSP allotments. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or local property tax values, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not directly conflict with this provision.
quote: The purpose of the tier two component of the Foundation School Program is to provide each school district with the opportunity to provide the basic program and to supplement that program at a level of its own choice.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal effects on school district revenue would be addressed through FSP funding formulas elsewhere in Chapter 48, not in this purpose provision.
